Son of the Mask (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,018,422Details
International Box Office $42,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $59,918,422
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,511,675 (44.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,966 opening theaters/2,966 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,753,561

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 18th, 2005 (Wide) by New Line
International Releases: March 25th, 2005 (Wide), released as Son Of The Mask (Australia)
Video Release: January 16th, 2007 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for action, crude and suggestive humor and language.
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Mask
Cast, crew, or production detail: Famously Bad, Legacy Sequel, Standalone Sequel
Source material: Dark Horse Comics
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Time period setting: Norse Mythology
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Radar Pictures, Dark Horse Entertainment
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
